wiki.summary: "PINKY UP" is the sixth digital single by global girl group KATSEYE. It was released on April 9, 2026. The song's title playfully subverts the old-school etiquette rule of raising your pinky while drinking tea, a gesture that symbolized class and wealth, being fancy. The song changes it's meaning, being fancy isn't about money or class, it's about being your true self, being confident. The end of the world is a metaphor of ignoring the future, to enjoy the present, no matter how chaotic things get. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "PINKY UP" is the sixth digital single by global girl group KATSEYE. It was released on April 9, 2026. The song's title playfully subverts the old-school etiquette rule of raising your pinky while drinking tea, a gesture that symbolized class and wealth, being fancy. The song changes it's meaning, being fancy isn't about money or class, it's about being your true self, being confident. The end of the world is a metaphor of ignoring the future, to enjoy the present, no matter how chaotic things get. The quote from Socrates, "The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing." means that you don't need the answers to every question in life and just to be assured and have fun. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
